headline: Trump win fuels stock rally: Nasdaq up 400 points, gold plunges

Meanwhile, gold (GC=F) prices are falling as investors shift away from the traditional safe-haven asset and embrace the Trump trade instead. Another stock in the spotlight is Meta Platforms (META) as the Supreme Court is set to hear an appeal from the tech giant regarding a securities fraud lawsuit today.
